title: Savory Crunchy Vegan Greek Lemongrass Stir-fry
description: A savory and crunchy vegan Greek dish featuring lemongrass stalks, perfect for a sick day or anytime you need something light and refreshing.
instructions: Cut lemongrass into bite-sized pieces, set aside.
Mince garlic and finely chop onions.
Heat a pan with some oil over medium heat. Add the minced garlic and onions to sauté for about 2 minutes.
Add lemongrass to the pan and stir fry for another 3-5 minutes until softened and fragrant.
Serve hot as a snack or side dish.
